verses.1: Behold, a king shall reign in righteousness,
verses.2: A man shall be as a hiding place from the wind,
verses.3: The eyes of those who see will not be dim,
verses.4: The heart of the rash will understand knowledge,
verses.5: The fool will no longer be called noble,
verses.6: For the fool will speak folly,
verses.7: The ways of the scoundrel are evil.
verses.8: But the noble devises noble things,
verses.9: Rise up, you women who are at ease! Hear my voice!
verses.10: For days beyond a year you will be troubled, you careless women;
verses.11: Tremble, you women who are at ease!
verses.12: Beat your breasts for the pleasant fields,
verses.13: Thorns and briers will come up on my people’s land;
verses.14: For the palace will be forsaken.
verses.15: until the Spirit is poured on us from on high,
verses.16: Then justice will dwell in the wilderness;
verses.17: The work of righteousness will be peace,
verses.18: My people will live in a peaceful habitation,
verses.20: Blessed are you who sow beside all waters,
